name: _chunk_hash
description: unique hash for the trajectory chunk job

name: _processed_at
description: time at which trajectory worker submits record to BQ pubsub

name: seg_cnt
description: total number of segments in the chunk

name: seg_ef_cnt
description: number of segments with non-zero ef

name: seg_ef_nan_cnt
description: number of segments with nan ef

name: chunk_len_km
description: total length of the flight chunk

name: lat_start
description: latitude of first waypoint in chunk

name: lon_start
description: longitude of first waypoint in chunk

name: lat_end
description: latitude of last waypoint in chunk

name: lon_end
description: longitude of last waypoint in chunk

name: time_start
description: timestamp of first waypoint in chunk

name: time_end
description: timestamp of last waypoint in chunk

name: median_altitude_ft
description: median altitude across flight segments, in feet

name: total_persistent_contrail_length_km
description: total length of flight segments that produce persistent contrails (non-zero EF)

name: total_contrail_length_sac_km
description: total length of flight segments that meet the SAC

name: max_contrail_lifetime_h
description: maximum contrail segment lifetime among contrail forming flight segments.

name: median_contrail_lifetime_h
description: median contrail segment lifetime among contrail forming flight segments.

name: pycontrails_ver
description: version of pycontrails used in model run

name: perf_model_id
description: identifier of the perf model

name: nvpm_data_source
description: identifier of the nvPM data source

name: source_id
description: the source identifier for the trajectory chunk job

name: git_sha
description: git sha of the trajectory-worker

name: zarr_uri
description: id of the model_run_at time of the zarr store used in running cocip

name: sum_ef_mj
description: sum of the calculated ef values, units 10^6*[J]

name: total_fuel_burn_kg
description: total kg of fuel burn for chunk

name: total_co2_kg
description: total kg of co2 from fuel combustion for chunk

name: total_h2o_kg
description: total kg of h2o from fuel combustion ...

name: total_so2_kg
description: total kg of so2 from fuel combustion ...

name: total_sulphates_kg
description: total kg of sulphates from fuel combustion ...

name: total_oc_kg
description: total kg of organic carbon from fuel combustion ...

name: total_nox_kg
description: total kg of nox from fuel combustion ...

name: total_co_kg
description: total kg of co from fuel combustion ...

name: total_hc_kg
description: total kg of hydrocarbons from fuel combustion ...

name: total_nvpm_kg
description: total kg of non-volatile PM from fuel combustion ...

name: total_nvpm_giga_cnt
description: total cnt (*10^9) of non-volatile PM ...

name: aircraft_type_icao
description: icao aircraft type identifier used in model

name: engine_uid
description: engine uid used in model

name: mean_aircraft_mass_kg
description: mean (time averaged) aircraft mass in [kg]

name: mean_overall_efficiency
description: mean (time averaged) engine efficiency

name: icao_address
description: icao address of the aircraft

name: flight_id
description: ADS-B provider (e.g. Spire) generated UUID of the aircraft

name: callsign
description: call sign of the aircraft

name: tail_number
description: tail number of the aircraft

name: flight_number
description: flight_number of the aircraft

name: airline_iata
description: airline iata code for the aircraft

name: departure_airport_icao
description: airport icao for departure (origin) location

name: departure_scheduled_time
description: scheduled time for departure from origin

name: arrival_airport_icao
description: airport icao for arrival (destination) location

name: arrival_scheduled_time
description: scheduled time for arrival to destination
